pages.raw_text:
Do you citizens of Spokane understand the conditions
of this most unusual campaign for the office mayor of
your city,


Have you clear appreciation of the reasons why the
SpokesmanReview and the corporations are trying to
make you believe w. H. Acutf is political Messiah?


DO you fully realize why those corporations spend
ing big sums of money to bring about the election of W. H.
Acuf?


Do you know why Lientha is given columns in the
tall tower organs when matter of fact he is only
selfish man looking for job at $3.50 month?


Do you know why d. NJ Comstock wrote that repub
canAcuff platform which endorsed Mayor Boyd and ig
nored water meters, franchise amendments and all the
other important issues of the people?


DO you know why they are trying so hard to defeat
Clean honest fearless Floyd Daggett, against whom they
can only say that he is untried as mayor?


If you don know the why and whereor of these things
let The Press tell you


The Spokesman-Review, owned by W. H. Cowles.


The Trident Water Meter company controlled by w.
H. Cowles and d. NJ Comsock.


The Washington Water Power company.


The Pacific States Telephone company.


Water Commissioner F. P. Weymouth who last Sun
day, agreed to favor Trident water meters if W. H. Acu
would reappont him.


The Spokesman Review months ago told City Engin-
Gill that if he did not include the of water
in his report that paper and the Chronicle would drive him
from Office and make its readers believe him crook and
scoundrel.


The Trident Water Meter company traded it's meters,
which to be fosted upon the people, for Fossil P Wey
mouth who is to do the fosting.


The Washington Water Power company traded for w.
H. Acuff condition it be allawed to the council
to be elected and controlled by Harry L. Blocker the
official fXer.


The Pacific States Telephone company entered the
deal with the understanding that its creature, Coun
Gilman Jack Snyder and other councmen be elected to
handle franchise matters


Each of these has contributed of money
with which to railroad W. H. Acuf into the mayors chair


They have made it fight of the corporations against
the people.


Acuff stands for the corporations.


Daggett stands for the people.


Acutf stands for the steal of Maxwell and the
Howard street bridge, SO brazeny done by The Washing
ton Water Power company.


Dagge stands for the preservation of the citys rights
from the corporation banditti.


vote for Lientha is vote for Acu and the corpo-
ratons


Solve this problem and aid your interests by vot
ing for Floyd Daggett and his associates.


SCRATCH EVERY MAN WHO WEARS "A CORPO-
RATION COLLAR!
